Package org.areslib.math.geometry

Class Pose2d

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.math.geometry.Pose2d
All Implemented Interfaces:
Interpolatable<Pose2d>
public class Pose2d extends Object implements Interpolatable<Pose2d>
Represents a 2D pose containing translational and rotational elements.

  • Method Details

    • set

      public void set(Pose2d other)
      Sets the pose to match another pose in-place. Eliminates the need to instantiate new Pose2d objects in tight odometry loops.

    • set

      public void set(Translation2d translation, Rotation2d rotation)
      Sets the pose components in-place.
      Parameters:
      translation - The new translation.
      rotation - The new rotation.

    • copy

      public Pose2d copy()
      Creates a deep copy of the pose.
      Returns:
      A new Pose2d instance with copied components.

    • set

      public void set(double x, double y, double angleRadians)
      Sets the pose components in-place.
      Parameters:
      x - The new X coordinate.
      y - The new Y coordinate.
      angleRadians - The new angle in radians.

    • minus

      public Transform2d minus(Pose2d other)

      public Pose2d plus(Pose2d other)

    • transformBy

      public Pose2d transformBy(Pose2d other)

      public Pose2d relativeTo(Pose2d other)

    • interpolate

      public Pose2d interpolate(Pose2d endValue, double t)
      Description copied from interface: Interpolatable
      Interpolates between this value and another value.
      Specified by:
      interpolate in interface Interpolatable<Pose2d>
      Parameters:
      endValue - The end value to interpolate towards.
      t - The percentage to interpolate [0.0, 1.0]. 0.0 returns this value, 1.0 returns the endValue.
      Returns:
      The interpolated value.

      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • exp

      public Pose2d exp(Twist2d twist)
      Obtain a new Pose2d from a (constant curvature) velocity.

      See Controls Engineering in the FIRST Robotics Competition section 10.2 "Pose exponential" for a derivation.

      Parameters:
      twist - The twist to map to a Pose2d.
      Returns:
      The new Pose2d.

    • exp

      public void exp(Twist2d twist, Pose2d out)
      Calculates the exponential map (constant curvature velocity integration) in-place.
      Parameters:
      twist - The twist to apply.
      out - The object to populate with the result.

    • log

      public Twist2d log(Pose2d end)
      Returns a Twist2d that maps this pose to the end pose.

      If c is the cosine of dtheta and s is the sine of dtheta, and the transformation is given by (x, y, theta), then the velocity vector (dx, dy, dtheta) can be computed.

      Parameters:
      end - The end pose.
      Returns:
      The twist that maps this pose to the end pose.
